name: Cowboy Caviar
recipeIngredient: 2 Large Hard Cooked Eggs, Peeled and Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and rinse 1 can of black beans.
2. Chop 1 can of ripe olives and drain.
3. Finely chop 1 small onion and 2 cloves of garlic.
4. Mix the olive oil, lime juice, salt, red pepper flakes, cumin, and pepper in a bowl until combined.
5. Add the cooked black beans, chopped olives, onions, and garlic to the bowl with the spices and mix well.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
7. Spread the softened cream cheese on a serving plate.
8. Spoon the bean mixture evenly over the cream cheese.
9. Arrange the peeled and chopped eggs in a ring around the edge of the plate, sprinkle with sliced green onion.
